description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern design, featuring a combination of cream and muted red upholstery. The seating area is generously cushioned, with tufted seat surfaces and a series of loose back cushions adorned with subtle floral and geometric patterns. The lounge includes two matching square ottomans positioned in front, which can serve as footrests or small tables. The armrests are broad and padded, matching the overall upholstery and providing a cohesive look. The backrest is straight and uniform in height, with a row of decorative cushions for added comfort. The lounge sits low to the ground, with short, sturdy legs that are mostly concealed by the upholstery.
description: A modern, L-shaped sectional lounge with tufted cream and muted red upholstery, loose patterned cushions, and two matching ottomans. Features broad padded armrests and a straight, cushioned backrest.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, all seat and back cushions, and both ottomans placed in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the armrest profile, and the arrangement of cushions along the backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid back panel and the length of the lounge, with minimal cushion detail visible.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view revealing the overall layout, cushion arrangement, and the placement of ottomans relative to the lounge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose back cushions in a row, one corner cushion, and two seat ottomans; all cushions are rectangular and similarly sized, with the back cushions featuring patterns and the seat cushions tufted.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, uniform-height backrest with a flat top and no visible segmentation; topped with loose decorative cushions for added comfort.
attribute_armrest_presence: Broad, padded armrests on both ends, matching the height of the backrest and featuring a squared, modern profile.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs mostly hidden by the upholstery, likely made of wood or metal, providing a low-profile and sturdy base.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery features a mix of solid cream and muted red panels with geometric cross-stitching on the red sections and tufted detailing on the seat surfaces; back cushions display subtle floral and geometric patterns.
